---
title: "10-Year Fuel Price Change — US Map"
subtitle: "How gasoline prices have moved by PADD region since ~10 years ago"
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/helpers.R")
ENERGY_DIR <- file.path(DATA_ROOT, "energy")

read_csv_safe <- function(p) {
  if (!file.exists(p) || file.size(p) == 0) return(tibble::tibble())
  suppressWarnings(readr::read_csv(p, show_col_types = FALSE))
}

padd <- read_csv_safe(file.path(ENERGY_DIR, "padd_gas_10y.csv"))
have <- nrow(padd) > 0

padd_states <- list(
  R10 = c("CT","DE","DC","FL","GA","ME","MD","MA","NH","NJ","NY","NC","PA","RI","SC","VT","VA","WV"),
  R20 = c("IL","IN","IA","KS","KY","MI","MN","MO","NE","ND","OH","OK","SD","TN","WI"),
  R30 = c("AL","AR","LA","MS","NM","TX"),
  R40 = c("CO","ID","MT","UT","WY"),
  R50 = c("AK","AZ","CA","HI","NV","OR","WA")
)
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Percentage change in retail regular gasoline by PADD region between the
current week and the nearest observation ~10 years ago. Positive (red) =
prices rose; negative (green) = prices fell.
:::

## 10-year % change by region {#map}

```{r map}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr have
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(plotly))

state_df <- purrr::map_dfr(names(padd_states), function(r) {
  row <- padd |> dplyr::filter(duoarea == r)
  if (nrow(row) == 0) return(tibble::tibble(state = padd_states[[r]]))
  tibble::tibble(state = padd_states[[r]],
                 padd  = row$area_name[1],
                 pct_change = row$pct_change_10y[1],
                 abs_change = row$abs_change_10y[1])
}) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(pct_change))

plot_ly(state_df,
        type = "choropleth",
        locationmode = "USA-states",
        locations = ~state,
        z = ~pct_change,
        text = ~paste0("<b>", state, "</b><br>", padd,
                       "<br>10-yr: ", ifelse(pct_change >= 0, "+", ""),
                       formatC(pct_change, digits = 1, format = "f"), "%",
                       "<br>Abs: ", ifelse(abs_change >= 0, "+$", "-$"),
                       formatC(abs(abs_change), digits = 2, format = "f"), "/gal"),
        hoverinfo = "text",
        colorscale = list(c(0, "#2f9e44"),
                          c(0.5, "#fcbf49"),
                          c(1, "#bc4749")),
        colorbar = list(title = "% change",
                        tickformat = ".1f")) |>
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Retail gasoline — 10-year percent change by PADD",
                 x = 0.5, xanchor = "center"),
    geo = list(scope = "usa", projection = list(type = "albers usa"),
               showlakes = TRUE, lakecolor = "#ffffff")
  ) |>
  config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
```

## Table {#table}

```{r table}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr have
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(reactable))

reactable(
  padd |>
    dplyr::transmute(padd = area_name, price_10y_ago, price_now,
                     abs_change_10y, pct_change_10y, date_10y_ago),
  striped = TRUE, compact = TRUE, highlight = TRUE,
  theme = reactableTheme(borderColor = "#dee2e6"),
  defaultSorted = list(pct_change_10y = "desc"),
  columns = list(
    padd            = colDef(name = "Region", minWidth = 180),
    price_10y_ago   = colDef(name = "10y ago ($/gal)",
                             format = colFormat(digits = 3)),
    price_now       = colDef(name = "Now ($/gal)",
                             format = colFormat(digits = 3),
                             style = list(fontWeight = 600)),
    abs_change_10y  = colDef(name = "Δ abs ($/gal)",
                             format = colFormat(digits = 3),
                             style = function(v) list(
                               color = if (is.na(v)) "#6c757d" else if (v > 0) "#bc4749" else "#2f9e44",
                               fontWeight = 600)),
    pct_change_10y  = colDef(name = "Δ %",
                             format = colFormat(digits = 1, suffix = "%"),
                             style = function(v) list(
                               color = if (is.na(v)) "#6c757d" else if (v > 0) "#bc4749" else "#2f9e44",
                               fontWeight = 600)),
    date_10y_ago    = colDef(name = "Base-period date")
  )
)
```

```{r no-data}
#| echo: false
#| eval: !expr '!have'
htmltools::div(class = "callout callout-warning",
  htmltools::p("10-year PADD data not populated — requires the EIA pipeline ",
               "to have accumulated ≥10 years of weekly history. Bootstrap ",
               "fetches ~10 years on first run."))
```
